title: More Menu (Part 2/2)
heading: Tenders
text:
West Tripura during FY 2025-26 The Tender Box will be kept in the Chamber of the Block Development Officer, Office of the Mandwi R.D. Block, West Tripura | 29/01/2026 | 02/02/2026 | |
| NOTICE INVITING QUOTATION FOR HIRING OF VEHICLE | Quotation is hereby invited from the intending resourceful, bonafide Indian citizen as individual, society or corporate body having good condition with experience with mechanical capability to supply 1(one) No. vehicle “EECO/WAGONR” on hiring basis for the period from 01.02.2026 for use of office of the Child Development Project Officer, Jirania ICDS Project, Jirania. | 15/01/2026 | 27/01/2026 | |
content:
